instruction:
You will be asked to answer the following question as part of the LinkedIn Skill assessments.

You find that your project has a tag and branch both named push-notifications, which causes confusion when trying to print out given reference. How can you specify which branch you want to look at?
output: To specify which branch you want to look at, you can use the Git command "git checkout <branch-name>". This command will change the active branch to the one specified in the command. Additionally, you can use the Git command "git branch -v" to list the branches and their corresponding commit references.

instruction:
You should write a Product Description that will persuade the buyer that the product is beneficial.

Flipslide Game, Electronic Handheld Game | Flip, Slide, and Match the Colors to Beat the Clock - 4 Game Modes - Multiplayer Fun
output: Welcome to the Flipslide Game, an electronic handheld game that will keep you in the game with hours of entertainment! With 4 exciting game modes and multiplayer fun, you can challenge yourself and your friends to see who can beat the clock. Flip, slide, and match the colors as you tap and slide your way to victory. Sharpen your skills and strategize your moves to be the best. This game is perfect for adults and children alike, so get ready to have a blast with the Flipslide Game!

instruction:
Write a  review based on the given information.

- Product: Persil Discs Laundry Detergent Pacs, Original Scent, High Efficiency (HE) Compatible, Laundry Soap, 62 Count
- Sentiment: Positive
output: I recently tried the Persil Discs Laundry Detergent Pacs and I am so glad I did! The original scent is delightful and I love how it works in HE compatible machines. My clothes come out looking and smelling great! I highly recommend this laundry soap for anyone who wants a high-quality detergent that gets the job done.

instruction:
Write a short description about the given movie or series.

The Witcher (2019)
output: The Witcher (2019) is a dark fantasy drama series based on the best-selling book series of the same name. It stars Henry Cavill as Geralt of Rivia, an enhanced monster hunter with supernatural powers. It follows Geralt's journeys and adventures as he searches for his destiny in a world filled with magical creatures, dangerous foes, and powerful allies. The series also stars Freya Allan, Anya Chalotra, Jodhi May, and Björn Hlynur Haraldsson.
